title: schoepfia cubensis
intro: Schoepfia cubensis, also known as Cuban tree or Cuban tree-of-life, is a species of flowering plant in the family Olacaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Schoepfia cubensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and other preparations.
